positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical illustration featuring a celestial forest scene. The main subject is a majestic, stylized crescent moon nestled among bioluminescent flora and geometric cosmic elements. The composition must be centered and framed like an enamel print. Style should combine elements of Art Deco illustration and neo-mysticism, using clean silhouettes and intricate line work. Color palette emphasizes deep midnight blues, iridescent golds, emerald greens, and soft moonlight whites. Focus on strong contrast, rich depth, and perfect visual symmetry. Suitable for a large, central apparel print.
negative: blurry, amateur, low resolution, artifacts, watermark, text, logos, signatures, copyright, cropped, worst quality, bad anatomy, messy, extra limbs, noisy
